name: Bing Bong
ability: You start knowing a player. When they die, you die instead & they can't change alignment & might not die from now on.
flavor: Take her to the moon for me.

name: Secretary
ability: You start knowing two in-play characters.
flavor: Yes, Karen, the manager is on their way.

name: Quitter
ability: On your 1st night, choose a player (not yourself): If they die, you can no longer vote on any nominations, even if you are dead.
flavor: “We just lost our greatest information.. Evil must be stomping, there’s no more point in trying.”

firstNightReminder: Tell them 2 phrases & what happens if they say each phrase.
name: Chocolatier
ability: You start knowing 2 phrases & what happens when you say each for the first time phrase. Once you say a phrase, you immediately die if you say the other.
flavor: White chocolate is SOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO good. But I see that dark chocolate eyeing me in the corner... stawp ittttt.
